amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code in at Entry Kiosk
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Shuttle service to SAN is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle runs on demand.

departure.text: When you return to SAN, please call (619) 291-1234 to arrange return shuttle pickup. Please allow 10-15 minutes for the shuttle to arrive due to construction at the airport.
Scan QR Code out at Exit Kiosk

common.title: SDPSF - Lot A (Cruise Ship Parking)
common.operator_display_name: San Diego's Park Shuttle & Fly Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3405 Pacific Hwy. This is the San Diego's Park, Shuttle & Fly. It is located on the southwest side of Pacific Hwy. between Sassafras St. and W Washington St. The entrance is marked by a white 'Park Shuttle & Fly Airport Parking Enter Here' sign with white and black lettering.
restrictions: It is strongly suggested to arrive 3 hours prior to your departure time to provide yourself ample time to arrive at the airport.

NOTE: Customers MUST scan their QR Code provided in the reservation confirmation upon entering the parking facility. Customers must also scan upon exiting the parking facility. No ticket is needed when scanning the code.
NOTE: If you overstay your original reservation, you are subject to pay the rate posted at the parking facility. Reservation extensions made through SpotHero will NOT be accepted by this facility.

Shuttle service to SAN is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle runs on demand. When you return to SAN, please call (619) 291-1234 to arrange return shuttle pickup. Please allow 10-15 minutes for the shuttle to arrive due to construction at the airport.

This location allows flexible booking. As long as customers park within the same parking type, you have the option to park in either Lot A or Lot B upon arrival. For example, if a customer reserves Lot A - Uncovered Self Park, you have the option to park in Lot B - Uncovered Self Park upon arrival.

arrival.text: Upon your arrival, see attendant who will direct you where to park.
Attendant will provide a claim ticket and instructions on where to board the shuttle
Arrive a minimum of 30-40 minutes before you want to be at your terminal. The shuttle arrives on average every 15-25 minutes to pick you up and take you to your terminal.

departure.text: When you arrive back at SAN, proceed to the Shuttle Pick up area, located at the lower level, and wait under the sign that reads "COURTESY SHUTTLE". The shuttle arrives every 20-25 minutes.
To have your car ready, please use E-parking Link provided to you via text at the time of check-in.
Simply leave when you are ready to go!

common.title: Fox Auto Parks SAN - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Fox Rent A Car Inc Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3201 Bean Street. This is the entrance address for the Fox Auto Parks - Uncovered self-park lot, operated by Fox Auto Parks. It is located on the south side of California at the dead end of Bean St. on the right side.
restrictions: Our facility can accommodate most passenger cars, trucks and SUV’s. Add $3.00/day for Medium SUVs, minivans, and medium trucks. Add $8.00/day for full-size Trucks and full-size SUVs.
Shuttle Notice: Please allow up to 30 minutes for shuttle pickup and drop-off. Plan accordingly when traveling to the airport.
Shuttles operate during open hours. Full details for your return and other information will be on your claim ticket.
We do NOT accept trailers, campers, RV’s, dual and oversized axle vehicles at Fox Auto Parks.
You can track the location of airport shuttles by clicking here

arrival.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
Shuttle service to SAN is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle departs every 10 minutes.

departure.text: When you return to SAN, please wait for the shuttle outside the Baggage Claim area at Transportation Plaza.
When you're ready to go, show the valet your ticket and your car will be retrieved.

common.title: Aladdin Airport Parking - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 2548 Kettner Blvd. This is the Aladdin Airport Parking garage, operated by SP+. It is located on the west/right-hand side of Kettner Blvd. (a one-way street) between W Maple St. and W Laurel St. The entrance is marked by a blue 'Aladdin Airport Parking' sign with white lettering.
restrictions: Height restriction: 6' 9"

Shuttle service to SAN is available at no additional cost from this location 24/7. The shuttle departs every 10 minutes. When you return to SAN, please wait for the shuttle outside the Baggage Claim area at Transportation Plaza.

While a printed copy of your SpotHero Parking Pass is not required at this location, the checkout process will be expedited if you are able to print one out prior to retrieving your vehicle. If you're unable to, this is not a problem.

arrival.text: Show the Valet your SpotHero reservation to receive a valet ticket. The Valet will park your vehicle.
Take the shuttle to the airport.

departure.text:
Call 619-233-0412 to request the shuttle upon your arrival.
Shuttle service is available at the Transportation Plazas across from Terminals 1 and 2. From Terminal 1, cross the skybridge and take the escalators or the elevators to street level. From Terminal 2, use the pedestrian crosswalk outside the Terminal 2 Baggage Claim Area to access the Transportation Plaza.
When returning, please provide the valet with your ticket. The valet will retrieve your vehicle.
Once your vehicle is retrieved, you are free to go!

common.title: Laurel Airport Parking - Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1025 W Laurel St. This is the Laurel Airport Parking Covered Valet, operated by JAZ Parking Inc. It is located on the south side of Laurel St. between California St. and Kettner Blvd. The entrance is marking by a large grey "Airport Parking" sign.
restrictions: Due to heavy traffic at the airport during the holiday season, please expect shuttle details for pick-ups and drop-offs.
Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.

restrictions:

We accept no responsibility for loss or damage to vehicle or contents.

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Make your way to the airport via taxi or rideshare.

departure.text: Make your way back to the parking facility via taxi or rideshare.
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: Marina Cortez Lot - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1880 Harbor Island Dr. This is the entrance address for the Marina Cortez lot, operated by LAZ Parking. It is located on the north side of Harbor Island Dr. The entrance is marked by a 'Marina Cortez' sign.
restrictions: Book a ride to the airport using a rideshare service!
For any questions, please do not contact the marina office. Rather, please contact Hannibal Flores at (619) 245-3994 or Manuel Farfar at (619) 675-1545
No oversized vehicles or campers allowed.

arrival.text: Upon arrival at the hotel, please take a ticket from the gate’s ticketing system. Bring this ticket to the hotel’s front desk along with your prepaid SpotHero reservation. The front desk will issue you a parking pass for your vehicle. Notify the front desk that you’d like a ride to the airport.

Parking is located in the east side parking lot, which is the first lot you will see before reaching the hotel building. Please leave the pass on your dashboard and ensure it is clearly visible at all times.
Gather your belongings and board the shuttle when you are ready.

departure.text: After arriving back at SAN, collect your luggage and give the hotel a call to request shuttle pickup.
Once back at the Hilton, customers will need to return to the front desk to receive a validation ticket to exit the parking lot.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Hilton San Diego Airport/Harbor Island - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1960 Harbor Island Dr. This is the Hilton San Diego Airport/Harbor Island - Uncovered Self Park lot, operated by Hilton San Diego Airport/Harbor Island. It is located on the Northwest side of Harbor Island Dr. between N Harbor Dr. and the end of Harbor Island Dr.
restrictions: Height restriction: 6' 5"
Large passenger vans and buses NOT accepted at this location. Violators will be subject to a ticket and/or tow.
Shuttle Notice: Please allow up to 30 minutes for shuttle pickup and drop-off. Plan accordingly when traveling to the airport.

Retrieve your car and you're free to go!

Gather your belongings and arrange your taxi/rideshare to the airport.

departure.text: When you arrive back at SAN, gather your belongings and arrange your taxi/rideshare back to the garage.
When you are ready to leave, stop at the exit gate and press the help button. Give your reservation details to the attendant, and they will open the gate for you.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: 925 Waterfront Pl. - IQHQ RaDD Garage
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 925 Waterfront Pl. This is the IQHQ RaDD garage, operated by Ace Parking. It is located on the South side of Waterfront Pl. between Pacific Hwy. and N Harbor Dr.
restrictions: If parking overnight, you must drop off and pick up your vehicle within the following hours: Monday to Sunday 5:00 AM – 11:30 PM.

arrival.text: Check in with the valet stand and show the Attendant your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
There is no shuttle service to the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi!

departure.text: When you return to the airport, please arrange transportation back to the facility using Rideshare or a Taxi. There is no shuttle service from the airport.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

restrictions: Airport listing noted as unavailable for guests.
